derivation_notes.key_format: pubkey(32 bytes) || kind(8 bytes LE) || created_at(8 bytes LE)
derivation_notes.levid_location: VALUE field (8-byte LE uint64) of each index entry
derivation_notes.sort_semantics: pubkey compared by memcmp (32 bytes); kind compared NUMERICALLY (LE uint64); created_at compared NUMERICALLY (LE uint64). The StringUint64Uint64 comparator: first memcmp the string prefix (pubkey), then numeric-compare kind, then numeric-compare created_at.

adversarial_demonstrations.name: created_at inversion within same pubkey+kind
adversarial_demonstrations.memcmp_wrong: ts_adv_high LE (00f2...) < ts_adv_low LE (fff1...) — memcmp inverts order

adversarial_demonstrations.name: kind inversion within same pubkey
adversarial_demonstrations.memcmp_wrong: kind256 LE (0001...) < kind255 LE (ff00...) — memcmp inverts kind order

derivation_notes.tie_resolution: Events with same (pubkey, kind, created_at) key sorted by levId ascending (MDB_DUPSORT + MDB_INTEGERDUP)
